name: xbox-friends
title: Xbox Friends
description: See which Xbox Live friends are online and what they're playing
author: maxpaolucci

commands.name: index
commands.title: View Xbox Friends
commands.description: See which Xbox Live friends are online and what they're playing

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: OpenXBL API Key
preferences.description: Get your free API key at xbl.io (not needed when Mock Data is enabled)

preferences.name: useMockData
preferences.title: Enable Mock Data
preferences.label: Show mock friends for testing without API key
preferences.description: Display fake friend data so you can preview the extension without an OpenXBL API key.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
